div1.entryFree: Tabor, a small drum used for festivity: Tp. IV, 175. LLL V, 1, 161. Cor. I, 6, 25. V, 4, 53. Accompanied by a pipe: I have known when there was no music with him but the drum and the fife; and now had he rather hear the t. and the pipe, Ado II, 3, 15. you would never dance again after a t. and pipe, Wint. IV, 4, 183. Used by fools: Tw. III, 1, 2. Tw. III, 1, 2
